subject: WM-0162 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. The two prior High findings are closed: ADR-0017 now approves protocolVersion 1/schemaVersion 3/GameSession projection v1 with sufficient render/UI fields, explicit InitSession/Ready negotiation, strict validation and fail-closed compatibility; WM-0164 is the sole exact sim-protocol writer. The DAG is strictly WM-0162->WM-0163->WM-0164->WM-0165->WM-0166, required checks reference only self/ancestor outputs, all four implementation tasks remain proposed/unclaimed, and no new message family, command/save expansion, release or PR-2+ scope is authorized. All required checks and quality pass.
